issues.description: Missing condition: OnKO trigger must include condition to check that KO was caused by opponent's effect. Current DSL has no condition filtering for 'opponent's effect'.

Rest action is not properly chained. The Rest action should be part of a conditional chain where both trash AND rest must succeed before playing the character. Current structure doesn't enforce 'If you do' logic correctly.
PlayFromHand filter incomplete: must include both {Fish-Man} OR {Merfolk} type using 'anyType' logic, not just 'subType'. Current filter only checks subType without OR condition for alternative type.
PlayFromHand action must be conditional on successful Rest. The 'If you do' language means play only happens if both trash AND rest were performed. Current nesting doesn't reflect this dependency.
